name: EXPRESSIONS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, list cancers with differential/high expression and related patent counts.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c:Cancer)
RETURN c.name AS cancer, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, cancer ASC
LIMIT 50;

result_schema.patent_count: Number of patents linked to targets expressed in the cancer

examples: Which cancers show differential/high expression for PD-1×VEGFA targets?
